overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city street. The player character walks past pedestrians, neon storefronts, and a giant multi-armed statue while exploring the urban environment with wet reflective streets and towering skyscrapers.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet street, passing various pedestrians with cybernetic enhancements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair walking past the camera

entered.detail: building facade with bright pink and cyan neon strip lighting and digital displays
large vertical digital billboard displaying a smiling face with enjoy! text
reflective wet pavement showing neon reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit street at night, with the camera walking forward past various cyberpunk-styled pedestrians. Bright pink and blue neon signs illuminate the left side of the street while a large digital billboard looms ahead in the center.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching large monument statue

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and flying vehicle overhead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large statue while looking up at the surrounding architecture and sky

notable_agents.action: flying car passing overhead between the skyscrapers

entered.detail: massive multi-armed statue holding glowing spheres, situated in the plaza center
red traditional Japanese gate structure behind the statue

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider plaza dominated by a massive multi-armed statue. The camera approaches the monument while tilting upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and a flying vehicle passing overhead between the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical canyon between skyscrapers looking upward

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead through the gap between tall buildings
camera tilts back down from sky view to street level

agents.ego_description: looking straight up at the sky between skyscrapers, then returning gaze to street level

entered.detail: patch of night sky visible between the towering building facades

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts vertically upward to frame the night sky between canyon-like skyscrapers as a flying car passes overhead. After a moment, the view tilts back down to street level, returning to the plaza with the statue now further away.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with arcade and vending machines

events.description: enters covered walkway with purple neon lighting and steam vents

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade area, passing by vending machines and seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: seated homeless person against the wall with blue bags

entered.detail: green neon sign reading BARF'S above a food counter
yellow and green automated vending machines with glowing displays
horizontal purple neon strips running along the ceiling and columns
ground vents emitting steam or smoke across the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by purple neon strips and steam vents. The area features a green neon sign for BARF'S, several vending machines, and scattered pedestrians walking through the sheltered arcade.

scene_state.functional_zone: street sidewalk alongside traffic with hotel entrance

events.description: exits covered walkway back onto open street with visible traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to moving traffic, approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the street

entered.detail: blue neon HOTEL sign with Japanese characters underneath
pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes across the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene returns to the open street alongside moving traffic. A blue neon HOTEL sign marks the left side while the camera walks toward a crosswalk, with the giant statue visible again in the distance and vehicles passing by on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city, moving from a crowded street into a monumental plaza and through a sheltered arcade. It begins by walking along a wet street illuminated by pink and blue neon signs, passing pedestrians toward a looming digital billboard. As the path opens into a wide plaza, the camera approaches a massive multi-armed statue and tilts upward to frame flying vehicles gliding between towering skyscrapers before returning to street level. The scene then shifts into a covered pedestrian walkway filled with purple neon strips, steam vents, and vending machines near a green sign for BARF'S. Finally, the camera exits the sheltered arcade to return to the open road, passing a blue hotel sign and moving toward a crosswalk with the distant statue and flowing traffic framing the view.
